name: Claude Code CLI Agent
description: Agent backend that shells out to the developer's installed `claude` binary (Anthropic Claude Code CLI). Zero-config: uses the developer's existing Anthropic login — no API keys needed (goal §1.1, A13). Detected on PATH via native-agent detection (highest preference). Implements P-plugin-3 Agent adapter. Salvaged invocation shape from pullfrog's agents/claude.ts (P-plugin-13).
